# Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick the applicable box. -->

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Data correction (cite the source in the description)
- [ ] New feature / view
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] My changes follow the style guide in `CLAUDE.md` (British English,
      no em dashes, no AI-filler vocabulary).
- [ ] If I changed Python: `ruff check` passes locally.
- [ ] If I changed TypeScript: `pnpm build` passes locally.
- [ ] Tests pass: `pytest` in any workspace I touched.
- [ ] If I changed data: I cited the source in the relevant row and the
      cleaning pipeline still completes without manual-review escalations.
- [ ] If I added or removed UI text, the page still reads well in
      a screen-reader.
